Grad Café Analytics — Developer Documentation

This documentation covers the Grad Café Analytics application built across JHU Modern Concepts in Python, Modules 2–4. It is intended for developers who want to run, test, or extend the service.

Contents

  • Overview & Setup
    • Prerequisites
    • Environment Variables
    • Local Setup
    • Running Tests
  • Architecture
    • Web Layer (app.py)
    • ETL Layer
    • Data Layer
    • Dependency Injection Pattern
  • API Reference
    • Flask Application (app.py)
    • Database Helper (db.py)
    • SQL Queries (query_data.py)
    • Data Loading (load_data.py)
    • Scrape + Load Orchestrator (pull_and_load.py)
  • Testing Guide
    • Running Tests
    • Markers
    • Test Fixtures (conftest.py)
    • Stable UI Selectors
    • Test Doubles
    • Coverage
    • Troubleshooting
  • Operational Notes
    • Busy-State Policy
    • Idempotency
    • Uniqueness Keys
    • Troubleshooting
    • Database Backup and Restore
    • Continuous Integration
    • Adding New Queries
